GGCon Talents VA Panels VTuber Panels Tournaments Schedule About
VTuber Panels
Interested in the voices behind the scenes at Genshin Impact and Marvel Rivals? Join us for our premiere voice actor panel, featuring a variety of voice actors with credits across games like Genshin Impact, Marvel Rivals, Legend of Zelda, and Destiny 2!

From Mondstadt to Inazuma: Genshin Impact Voice Actor Panel

Attention all travelers… Your adventure starts here! Come meet the voices behind your favorite characters from Genshin Impact and hear what goes on behind the mic and more!

12 - 1PM | Music 1145

Featured Voice Actors

Sean Chiplock as Diluc

An accredited voice actor across games and animation, Sean is widely recognized for bringing intensity and depth to Diluc (Genshin Impact), along with many other leading roles in RPGs and anime dubs, such as Guido Mista (JoJo’s Bizarre Adventure), Subaru Natsuki (Re:Zero),

Cory Yee as Gorou

Cory’s performances span games, anime, and commercials, with Gorou (Genshin Impact) standing out as a fan favorite for his warmth, loyalty, and humor. They are also known for other amazing roles as Akito (Ghostwire: Tokyo), Sigma and Bram Stoker (Bungo Stray Dogs), and Seishu Inui (Tokyo Revengers).

Patrick Pedraza as Wanderer

Known for dynamic and emotionally layered performances, Patrick brings the complex character of the Wanderer (Genshin Impact) to life with nuance that resonates strongly with players.

Kieran Regan as Heizou Shikanoin

Kieran’s energetic and charismatic delivery gives Heizou his signature charm, making the character memorable within the Genshin Impact universe.

Thank you to our sponsors
